methodsAttempted.query: site:maastrichtuniversity.nl generative AI students assessment policy
methodsAttempted.notes: Found official UM GenAI student, resources, precautions, and policy announcement pages.
Followed official resource-page links to central policy framework PDF, student guidelines PDF, and faculty-specific documents.
Fetched central policy framework PDF and student guidelines PDF; only the central framework produced usable text evidence.

artifacts.summary: Official UM sources include an adopted central GenAI policy framework, announcement, GenAI resource pages, student-facing guidance page, and responsible-use precautions page. Faculty/proposed sources and an image-based student-guidelines PDF were not used for UM-wide claim evidence.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Policy framework on Generative AI officially published
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Maastricht University has officially adopted a policy framework on Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI). This document clarifies UM’s position on GenAI and provides guidelines for its responsible use in education, research, and operations.

artifacts.title: Maastricht University GenAI Policy Staged Crawl Summary
artifacts.summary: Staged crawl found official Maastricht University GenAI sources, including the adopted central policy framework, an adoption announcement, resource index, student-facing GenAI page, and responsible-use precautions page. Claims are limited to UM-wide central sources and one UM guidance page; faculty-specific and proposed documents were not used for UM-wide claims.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Faculty-specific and proposal documents were discovered but not used to support UM-wide policy claims.
The official student guidelines PDF was fetched but not used because local text extraction did not produce usable original-language text.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
